dockerfileContent.description: The Dockerfile content used for the build
dockerfileContent.example:
FROM node:14
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
RUN npm install
CMD ["npm", "start"]

contextHashes.description: The context hashes used for the build

name.description: The name of the sandbox. If not provided, the sandbox ID will be used as the name

snapshot.description: The ID or name of the snapshot used for the sandbox

user.description: The user associated with the project

public.description: Whether the sandbox http preview is publicly accessible

networkBlockAll.description: Whether to block all network access for the sandbox

networkAllowList.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CIDR network addresses for the sandbox

domainAllowList.description: Comma-separated list of allowed domains for the sandbox

target.description: The target (region) where the sandbox will be created

cpu.description: CPU cores allocated to the sandbox

gpu.description: GPU units allocated to the sandbox

gpuType.description: Preferred GPU type for the sandbox. Accepts a single value or an ordered preference list — the scheduler tries each in order and pins the sandbox to the first that has capacity.

memory.description: Memory allocated to the sandbox in GB

disk.description: Disk space allocated to the sandbox in GB

autoStopInterval.description: Auto-stop interval in minutes (0 means disabled)

autoPauseInterval.description: Auto-pause interval in minutes (0 means disabled). Only supported for sandbox classes that support pausing. Not allowed for ephemeral sandboxes. At most one of autoStopInterval and autoPauseInterval may be non-zero. For non-ephemeral sandbox classes that support pausing, defaults to 60 minutes (with auto-stop disabled) when neither interval is provided.

autoArchiveInterval.description: Auto-archive interval in minutes (0 means the maximum interval will be used)

autoDeleteInterval.description: Auto-delete interval in minutes (negative value means disabled, 0 means delete immediately upon stopping)

ttlMinutes.description: Maximum time to live in minutes, counted as wall-clock time since creation regardless of sandbox state (0 means disabled). When it elapses the sandbox is destroyed, even if it is stopped, paused, or archived.

volumes.description: Array of volumes to attach to the sandbox

linkedSandbox.description: ID or name of an existing sandbox to link the new sandbox to. The new sandbox will be scheduled on the same runner as the linked sandbox so a local network can be established between them. Linked sandboxes must be ephemeral (autoDeleteInterval=0) and cannot themselves be linked to another sandbox.

secrets.description: Secrets to mount in this sandbox. Each entry maps an env var name to a vault secret name.

cpu.description: CPU cores to allocate to the sandbox (minimum: 1)

memory.description: Memory in GB to allocate to the sandbox (minimum: 1)

disk.description: Disk space in GB to allocate to the sandbox (can only be increased)

state.description: The new state for the sandbox

errorReason.description: Optional error message when reporting an error state

includeMemory.description: Include the VM's memory in the snapshot. VM sandboxes only. When true the sandbox must be STARTED; when false (default) VM sandboxes must be STOPPED. Container sandboxes do not support memory snapshots.

name.description: The name for the forked sandbox. If not provided, a unique name will be generated.

networkBlockAll.description: Whether to block all network access for the sandbox

networkAllowList.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CIDR network addresses for the sandbox

domainAllowList.description: Comma-separated list of allowed domains for the sandbox

secrets.description: Secrets to mount in this sandbox, replacing the previously mounted set. Each entry maps an env var name to a vault secret name. Pass an empty array to detach all secrets.

port.description: Port number of the signed preview URL

token.description: Token of the signed preview URL

id.description: Unique identifier for the SSH access

sandboxId.description: ID of the sandbox this SSH access is for

createdAt.description: When the SSH access was created

updatedAt.description: When the SSH access was last updated

sshCommand.description: SSH command to connect to the sandbox

valid.description: Whether the SSH access token is valid

sandboxId.description: ID of the sandbox this SSH access is for

url.description: The toolbox proxy URL for the sandbox

tags.description: Tags to associate with the runner

apiKey.description: The API key for the runner

proxyUrl.description: The proxy URL of the runner

cpu.description: The CPU capacity of the runner

memory.description: The memory capacity of the runner in GiB

disk.description: The disk capacity of the runner in GiB

lastChecked.description: The last time the runner was checked

eq.description: Match values equal to this value.

not.description: Match values not equal to this value.

in.description: Match values present in this list. Accepts comma-separated values or repeated query parameters. Maximum 100 entries.

notIn.description: Match values not present in this list. Accepts comma-separated values or repeated query parameters. Maximum 100 entries.

eq.description: Match values equal to this value.

not.description: Match values not equal to this value.

in.description: Match values present in this list. Accepts comma-separated values or repeated query parameters. Maximum 100 entries.

notIn.description: Match values not present in this list. Accepts comma-separated values or repeated query parameters. Maximum 100 entries.

gte.description: Match values greater than or equal to this value.

lte.description: Match values less than or equal to this value.

gt.description: Match values strictly greater than this value.

lt.description: Match values strictly less than this value.

gte.description: Match values greater than or equal to this timestamp (ISO 8601).

lte.description: Match values less than or equal to this timestamp (ISO 8601).

gt.description: Match values strictly greater than this timestamp (ISO 8601).

lt.description: Match values strictly less than this timestamp (ISO 8601).

nextToken.description: Token for next page in cursor-based pagination

retryCount.description: The number of times the initialization has been attempted

updatedAt.description: When the webhook initialization was last updated

severityText.description: Severity level text (e.g., INFO, WARN, ERROR)

serviceName.description: Service name that generated the log

total.description: Total number of log entries matching the query

spanCount.description: Number of spans in this trace

total.description: Total number of traces matching the query
